title: RawSourceRecord
description: Schema for all raw records arriving at the XPS Intelligence ingest layer. Every record from every source adapter must conform to this schema before being written to raw_records.

source_id.description: Unique identifier for the data source. Must match a registered source in seed/source-registry/source_registry.csv.

source_record_id.description: The unique identifier for this record within the source system. Used for deduplication.

record_type.description: The type of record being ingested.

ingested_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was received by the ingest layer.

source_created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was created in the source system, if known.

source_updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this record was last updated in the source system, if known.

raw_payload.description: The complete raw payload from the source, stored as-is for auditability and re-processing.

ingest_metadata.description: Metadata about the ingest operation itself.

adapter_version.description: Version of the source adapter that produced this record.

batch_id.description: Identifier for the ingest batch this record belongs to, if applicable.

source_file.description: Source file name if this record came from a file upload.

status.description: Processing status of this raw record.
